name: star-manager
description: Electron + Vue + Python desktop app for Star_Manager.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:5173 && set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& set ELECTRON_RENDERER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173&& electron ."
scripts.build:backend: conda run -n mm_env python -m PyInstaller --noconfirm --clean --onefile --name star_manager_backend --distpath build/backend --workpath build/pyinstaller --specpath build --paths backend --paths backend/app backend/app/server.py
scripts.package:win: npm run build && npm run build:backend && electron-builder --win dir
scripts.electron: npm run build && set ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=&& electron .
